rulings.Case Title: KENTON SHAIFFER et al VS. DURAMETALLIC CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Permit Plaintiffs To Amend Designation Of Expert Witnesses And To Re-Open Discovery For The Purpose Of Allowing The Deposition Of Ronald F. Dodson, Ph.D.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 3, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to permit plaintiffs to amend designation of expert witnesses and to re-open discovery for the purpose of allowing the deposition of Ronald Dodson, Ph.D.: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45 a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY RUPRECHT, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs¿ Responses To Defendant¿S Form Interrogatories, Set Two; Special Interrogatories, Set Two; And To Have Defendant¿S Requests For Admission, Set Two, Deemed Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 3, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Highland Stucco & Lime Products, Inc.'s motion to compel plaintiffs' responses to form interrogatories, set two; special interrogatories, set two; and to have defendant's requests for admission, set two, deemed admitted; and request for sanctions is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed May 22, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
